popularStory.headline: Abduction
popularStory.description: Matthew of Alsace abducted Marie from the abbey in 1160, and forced her to marry him in defiance of her religious vows.[1] He therefore became jure uxoris Count of Boulogne and co-ruler. On 18 Decembe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Blois於1136年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅時，她的父親Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre41歲，母親Mathilde de Boulogne31歲。她和Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne至少有2個女兒。她去世於1182年7月25日在法國艾-吉洛易丹諾維爾享年46歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯蒙崔易爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Blois was born in 1136, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre, was 41 and her mother, Mathilde de Boulogne, was 31. She had at least 2 daughters with Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne. She died on 25 July 1182, in Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Montreuil, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Blois est née en 1136, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Boulogne, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne. Elle est décédée le 25 juillet 1182, à Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Montreuil, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Blois 1136 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre 41 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Boulogne 31. ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Bloisが1136年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterreは41歳，母Mathilde de Boulogneは31歳であった。彼女はMathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1182年7月25日にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルデノンヴィルで46歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスモントレウイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Blois(이)가 1136년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Boulogne(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1182년 7월 25일 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 데넌빌에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 몽레우일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Blois nasceu em 1136, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Boulogne, tinha 31 anos. Ela faleceu em 25 de julho de 1182, em Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Montreuil, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Blois родилась в 1136 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Boulogne, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne. Она умерла 25 июля 1182 г. в местности денонвилл, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности монтреуил, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.
